prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: IGE-HWC-AFLELHBAIRWR-MED-BLCK Product Type: WALLET Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal Black Leather Police Bifold RFID Badge Holder with Removable ID Card Holder, Round Description: The ASR Federal Leather Police Bifold RFID Wallet Badge Holder with Removable ID Card Holder has been specifically designed for all private or public safety and security professionals who need their ID in one convenient location, and also for those, who at times, require discretion of their ID for undercover, covert or plainclothes operations. Importantly, the bifold wallet features Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) shield technology, preventing electronic pick-pocketing and identity theft, keeping your ID and credit cards safe and secure.

The ASR Federal badge holder RFID wallet features a clear removable card holder, as well as a built in clear ID card holder slot, a generous cash compartment, numerous credit card slots, a recessed badge cut-out mount—allowing your police badge to fit seamlessly in pockets without any extra added bulk—and lastly, an interior suede protection flap to keep badges scratch-free and add another layer of discretion when needed.

Made from 100% genuine leather, this badge holder wallet boasts a strong and sturdy construction with reinforced stitching and a heavy gauge leather body; the badge holder will relax over time with use as it molds to your carrying habits, but will never forego its integrity and structure.

Badge attachment is clip-back or pin-back, no screws required. This RFID wallet is specifically designed for a round-shaped (circle) police badge. Please measure your own personal badge to ensure it fits with this badge holder RFID leather wallet. The maximum badge size for this badge holder wallet is: 2.75 inches.

NOTE: Badge is NOT included with purchase Search Terms: fbi id card holder bifold wallets for men police gear tactical gear leather black detective undercover cops CIA credential holder law enforcement equipment security SWAT private investigator CSI federal badge holder identification secret service RFID Features: - RFID POLICE BADGE HOLDER WALLET: The ASR Federal leather bifold police badge holder wallet comes with Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) shield technology, preventing electronic pick-pocketing and identity theft, keeping your ID and credit cards safe and secure at all times - HIDDEN BADGE HOLDER MOUNT: This RFID wallet police badge holder features a recessed badge cut-out design that allows badges to fit seamlessly in the wallet without any extra added bulk; mounting is pin-back or clip back (no screws required) - SUEDE BADGE PROTECTION FLAP: The police badge holder and ID card holder features a built in suede badge protection flap to keep badges scratch free hidden from view if necessary in covert field situations; the wallet also includes a removable ID card holder, cash compartment, credit card slots and built in ID card holder slot - GENUINE LEATHER MATERIAL: This badge holder RFID wallet boasts a strong and sturdy construction with reinforced stitching and a heavy gauge leather body; the leather wallet will relax over time with use as it molds to your carrying habits, but will never forego its integrity and structure - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions 4.5 x 3.5 x 1 inches; Maximum Card Size: 2.75 x 4 inches; Color: Black; Material: Genuine Leather; Note: Badge attachment is clip back or pin back, no screws required; Maximum Round Badge Size: 2.75 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
